title: <div>Get to know the story so we’ll that if a computer crashes or your notebook
content:
Get to know the story so we’ll that if a computer crashes or your notebook is stolen, you could rewrite it from memory.

Get to know your story so well no one could steal it from you

More alone than I am now, less alone than I was before
